Package noppes.npcs.api.entity

Interface IEnergyAbility<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IEntity<T>
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IEnergyBarrier<T>, IEnergyBeam<T>, IEnergyDisc<T>, IEnergyDome<T>, IEnergyExplosion<T>, IEnergyLaser<T>, IEnergyOrb<T>, IEnergyPanel<T>, IEnergyProjectile<T>, IEnergySlicer<T>, IEnergySweeper<T>
    public interface IEnergyAbility<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
extends IEntity<T>
    Base interface for all energy ability entities (Projectiles, Barriers). Contains shared display, lightning, owner, and charging properties.

        capturesDrops, clearStoredData, clearTempData, despawn, dropItem, extinguish, getAge, getAllNbt, getBlockX, getBlockY, getBlockZ, getCapturedDrops, getCollidingEntities, getDimension, getEntityId, getHeight, getMCEntity, getMotion, getMotionX, getMotionY, getMotionZ, getMount, getNbt, getNbtOptional, getPitch, getPosition, getRider, getRotation, getStoredData, getStoredDataKeys, getSurroundingEntities, getSurroundingEntities, getTempData, getTempDataKeys, getType, getTypeName, getUniqueID, getWidth, getWorld, getX, getY, getYOffset, getZ, hasCollided, hasCollidedHorizontally, hasCollidedVertically, hasStoredData, hasTempData, inFire, inLava, inWater, isAirborne, isAlive, isBurning, isSneaking, isSprinting, knockback, knockback, knockback, removeStoredData, removeTempData, setBurning, setCapturedDrops, setCapturesDrops, setDimension, setImmune, setInvisible, setMotion, setMotion, setMotionX, setMotionY, setMotionZ, setMount, setNbt, setPitch, setPosition, setPosition, setRider, setRotation, setRotation, setSneaking, setSprinting, setStoredData, setTempData, setX, setY, setZ, spawnParticle, storeAsClone, typeOf, updateEntity

    • Method Detail

      • getOwnerEntityId

        int getOwnerEntityId()
        Returns:
        Entity ID of the caster who spawned this energy ability.

      • getOwner

        IEntity getOwner()
        Returns:
        The caster entity who spawned this energy ability, or null if not found.

      • getInnerColor

        int getInnerColor()
        Returns:
        Inner (core) color as a packed RGB integer.

      • setInnerColor

        void setInnerColor​(int color)
        Parameters:
        color - Inner color as a packed RGB integer.

      • getInnerAlpha

        float getInnerAlpha()
        Returns:
        Alpha (opacity) of the inner color layer (0.0-1.0).

      • setInnerAlpha

        void setInnerAlpha​(float alpha)
        Parameters:
        alpha - Inner color opacity (0.0-1.0).

      • getOuterColor

        int getOuterColor()
        Returns:
        Outer (glow) color as a packed RGB integer.

      • setOuterColor

        void setOuterColor​(int color)
        Parameters:
        color - Outer color as a packed RGB integer.

      • isOuterColorEnabled

        boolean isOuterColorEnabled()
        Returns:
        Whether the outer color layer is rendered.

      • setOuterColorEnabled

        void setOuterColorEnabled​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render the outer color layer.

      • getOuterColorWidth

        float getOuterColorWidth()
        Returns:
        Width of the outer color layer relative to the entity size.

      • setOuterColorWidth

        void setOuterColorWidth​(float width)
        Parameters:
        width - Outer color layer width.

      • getOuterColorAlpha

        float getOuterColorAlpha()
        Returns:
        Alpha (opacity) of the outer color layer (0.0-1.0).

      • setOuterColorAlpha

        void setOuterColorAlpha​(float alpha)
        Parameters:
        alpha - Outer color opacity (0.0-1.0).

      • hasLightningEffect

        boolean hasLightningEffect()
        Returns:
        Whether the lightning visual effect is enabled.

      • setLightningEffect

        void setLightningEffect​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render the lightning effect.

      • getLightningDensity

        float getLightningDensity()
        Returns:
        Density of lightning arcs (higher = more arcs).

      • setLightningDensity

        void setLightningDensity​(float density)
        Parameters:
        density - Lightning arc density.

      • getLightningRadius

        float getLightningRadius()
        Returns:
        Radius of the lightning effect around the entity, in blocks.

      • setLightningRadius

        void setLightningRadius​(float radius)
        Parameters:
        radius - Lightning effect radius in blocks.

      • getLightningFadeTime

        int getLightningFadeTime()
        Returns:
        Fade-out time for lightning arcs in ticks.

      • setLightningFadeTime

        void setLightningFadeTime​(int ticks)
        Parameters:
        ticks - Lightning fade-out time in ticks.

      • isCharging

        boolean isCharging()
        Returns:
        Whether this energy ability is currently in its charging phase.

      • getChargeProgress

        float getChargeProgress()
        Returns:
        Charge progress as a fraction (0.0-1.0).

      • isIgnoreIFrames

        boolean isIgnoreIFrames()
        Returns:
        Whether this entity ignores target invulnerability frames when dealing damage.

      • setIgnoreIFrames

        void setIgnoreIFrames​(boolean ignore)
        Parameters:
        ignore - Whether this entity should ignore target invulnerability frames when dealing damage.

      • getDamageData

        INbt getDamageData()
        Get the custom damage data attached to this energy entity. Used by addon handlers (e.g. DBC Addon) to carry damage configuration directly on the entity, enabling DBC damage scaling without a sourceAbility.
        Returns:
        Custom damage data as INbt, or null if none set.

      • setDamageData

        void setDamageData​(INbt data)
        Set custom damage data on this energy entity.
        Parameters:
        data - Custom damage data as INbt. Pass null to clear.

      • getMagicData

        IMagicData getMagicData()
        Get this entity's magic data. Defines magic types for outgoing damage splits or barrier defense interactions. Inherited from the source ability on spawn.
        Returns:
        the entity's magic data

      • setMagicData

        void setMagicData​(IMagicData data)
        Set magic data on this energy entity. Overrides any inherited ability magic.
        Parameters:
        data - Magic data to set.
